info.name: RateHub API — Full Test Suite
info.description: Comprehensive API test collection for RateHub v2. Covers all 77 endpoints.

body.raw: {"companyId":"{{companyId}}","overallRating":4,"content":"This is an integration test review. The company has a great culture and supportive management team.","isAnonymous":false}
{"companyId":"{{companyId}}","overallRating":10,"content":"This should fail validation because rating must be 1-5"}
{"companyId":"{{companyId}}","overallRating":4,"content":"Should fail without token because there is no auth"}
{"content":"Updated integration test review. Still great company with room for improvement overall."}
{"content":"Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate your honest review and are working to improve."}
{"content":"This second reply should fail because only one reply per review is allowed by design."}
{"content":"An employee should not be able to reply as company admin to this review."}
{"reviewId":"{{reviewId}}","reason":"spam","description":"This review seems like auto-generated spam content for testing."}

exec: if (!rid) { pm.test.skip('No replyId to delete'); return; }
